# API Contracts: LoadUp Frontend ↔ Backend

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan`  
**Date**: 2026-05-11  
**Feature**: 002-web-app

These contracts describe the HTTP interface the frontend consumes from the LoadUp REST API.  
Base URL: `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` (e.g. `http://localhost:3000`)  
All authenticated endpoints require: `Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`

---

## Authentication

### POST /auth/register

**Request**:

```json
{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "minSixChars"
}
```

**Response 201**:

```json
{
  "id": "...",
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "token": "<jwt>",
  "expiresIn": 86400,
  "createdAt": "2026-05-11T20:00:00.000Z"
}
```

**Error 400**: Validation failure (duplicate email, weak password)

---

### POST /auth/login

**Request**:

```json
{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "mypassword"
}
```

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "id": "...",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "token": "<jwt>",
  "expiresIn": 86400,
  "createdAt": "2026-05-11T20:00:00.000Z"
}
```

**Error 401**: Invalid credentials

---

## User

### GET /users/me _(authenticated)_

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "id": "...",
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "timezone": "America/Sao_Paulo",
  "createdAt": "2026-05-11T20:00:00.000Z"
}
```

---

## Training Sheet

### GET /training-sheet _(authenticated)_

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "_id": "...",
  "userId": "...",
  "days": [
    {
      "dayOfWeek": "monday",
      "type": "training",
      "exercises": [
        {
          "_id": "...",
          "name": "Supino Reto",
          "muscleGroup": "Peito",
          "series": [
            { "type": "warm-up", "reps": 15 },
            { "type": "working", "reps": 10 }
          ]
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

**Error 404**: No training sheet exists for user

---

### POST /training-sheet _(authenticated)_

Creates a new training sheet with all days defaulting to rest.

**Response 201**: Full TrainingSheet object (same as GET)

---

### PATCH /training-sheet/days/:dayOfWeek _(authenticated)_

Toggle a day between training and rest.

**Path**: `dayOfWeek` = `monday | tuesday | wednesday | thursday | friday | saturday | sunday`

**Request**:

```json
{
  "status": "training"
}
```

**Response 200**: Updated TrainingSheet object

---

## Exercises

### GET /training-sheet/days/:dayOfWeek/exercises _(authenticated)_

**Response 200**:

```json
[
  {
    "_id": "...",
    "name": "Supino Reto",
    "muscleGroup": "Peito",
    "series": [...]
  }
]
```

---

### POST /training-sheet/days/:dayOfWeek/exercises _(authenticated)_

**Request**:

```json
{
  "name": "Rosca Direta",
  "muscleGroup": "Bíceps",
  "series": [
    { "type": "warm-up", "reps": 15 },
    { "type": "working", "reps": 10 },
    { "type": "working", "reps": 8 }
  ]
}
```

**Response 201**: Full TrainingSheet object

---

### PATCH /training-sheet/days/:dayOfWeek/exercises/:exerciseId _(authenticated)_

**Request** (partial update):

```json
{
  "name": "Rosca Alternada",
  "series": [{ "type": "working", "reps": 12 }]
}
```

**Response 200**: Updated TrainingSheet object

---

### DELETE /training-sheet/days/:dayOfWeek/exercises/:exerciseId _(authenticated)_

**Response 204**: No Content (empty body)

---

## Training Sessions

### GET /training-sessions/today _(authenticated)_

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "_id": "...",
  "userId": "...",
  "date": "2026-05-11",
  "status": "pending",
  "loggedSets": [],
  "createdAt": "...",
  "updatedAt": "..."
}
```

**Error 404**: No session for today (frontend creates one via POST on first access to workout screen)

---

### POST /training-sessions _(authenticated)_

Creates a new session for today.

**Request**:

```json
{
  "date": "2026-05-11"
}
```

**Response 201**: TrainingSession object

---

### POST /training-sessions/:sessionId/records _(authenticated)_

Record a single performed set.

**Request**:

```json
{
  "exerciseName": "Supino Reto",
  "seriesType": "working",
  "seriesOrder": 1,
  "weight": 80,
  "repsCompleted": 10,
  "restTime": 90
}
```

- `seriesType`: `"warm-up" | "adjustment" | "working"`
- `seriesOrder`: integer ≥ 1 (position of the set within the exercise)
- `weight`: float ≥ 0.5, ≤ 500 (kg)
- `repsCompleted`: integer ≥ 0, ≤ 1000
- `restTime`: integer ≥ 0, ≤ 600 (seconds)

**Response 201**: Updated TrainingSession object

---

### PATCH /training-sessions/:sessionId/records/:recordId _(authenticated)_

Edit a previously recorded set.

**Request** (partial update — all fields optional):

```json
{
  "weight": 82.5,
  "repsCompleted": 9
}
```

**Response 200**: Updated TrainingSession object

---

### DELETE /training-sessions/:sessionId/records/:recordId _(authenticated)_

**Response 200**: Updated TrainingSession object

---

### PATCH /training-sessions/:sessionId/complete _(authenticated)_

Mark a session as completed or skipped.

**Request**:

```json
{
  "status": "completed"
}
```

- `status`: `"completed" | "skipped"`

**Response 200**: Updated TrainingSession object

---

## Calendar

### GET /calendar/today _(authenticated)_

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "date": "2026-05-11",
  "dayOfWeek": "sunday",
  "type": "training",
  "status": "pending",
  "exercises": [...],
  "sessionId": null
}
```

---

### GET /calendar _(authenticated)_

Monthly calendar. Query params: `?year=2026&month=5`

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "year": 2026,
  "month": 5,
  "days": [
    { "date": "2026-05-01", "dayOfWeek": "friday", "type": "training", "status": "completed" },
    ...
  ]
}
```

---

### GET /calendar/week _(authenticated)_

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "weekStart": "2026-05-11",
  "weekEnd": "2026-05-17",
  "days": [...]
}
```

---

## Progression

### GET /progression/summary _(authenticated)_

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "currentStreak": 4,
  "longestStreak": 12,
  "totalSessions": 47,
  "personalRecords": [
    {
      "exerciseName": "Supino Reto",
      "weight": 100,
      "reps": 8,
      "date": "2026-04-30"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### GET /progression/chart/:exerciseName _(authenticated)_

**Path**: `exerciseName` = URL-encoded exercise name (e.g. `Supino%20Reto`)

**Response 200**:

```json
{
  "exerciseName": "Supino Reto",
  "data": [
    { "date": "2026-04-01", "weight": 80, "reps": 10, "sessionId": "..." },
    { "date": "2026-04-08", "weight": 82.5, "reps": 10, "sessionId": "..." }
  ]
}
```

**Error 404**: Exercise not found or no history

---

## Common Error Shape

All errors follow:

```json
{
  "statusCode": 400,
  "message": "Descriptive error message",
  "error": "Bad Request"
}
```

**HTTP status codes used**:
| Code | Meaning |
|---|---|
| 200 | Success |
| 201 | Created |
| 400 | Validation error |
| 401 | Unauthenticated (token missing or expired) |
| 403 | Forbidden (not owner of resource) |
| 404 | Resource not found |
| 500 | Internal server error |

---

## Frontend Service Layer Mapping

| API endpoint                                           | Service file                           | Function name                                |
| ------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| POST /auth/register                                    | `src/services/authService.ts`          | `register(payload)`                          |
| POST /auth/login                                       | `src/services/authService.ts`          | `login(payload)`                             |
| GET /users/me                                          | `src/services/userService.ts`          | `getMe()`                                    |
| GET /training-sheet                                    | `src/services/trainingSheetService.ts` | `getTrainingSheet()`                         |
| POST /training-sheet                                   | `src/services/trainingSheetService.ts` | `createTrainingSheet()`                      |
| PATCH /training-sheet/days/:day                        | `src/services/trainingSheetService.ts` | `updateDay(day, payload)`                    |
| GET /training-sheet/days/:day/exercises                | `src/services/exerciseService.ts`      | `getExercises(day)`                          |
| POST /training-sheet/days/:day/exercises               | `src/services/exerciseService.ts`      | `addExercise(day, payload)`                  |
| PATCH /training-sheet/days/:day/exercises/:id          | `src/services/exerciseService.ts`      | `updateExercise(day, id, payload)`           |
| DELETE /training-sheet/days/:day/exercises/:id         | `src/services/exerciseService.ts`      | `deleteExercise(day, id)`                    |
| GET /training-sessions/today                           | `src/services/sessionService.ts`       | `getTodaySession()`                          |
| POST /training-sessions                                | `src/services/sessionService.ts`       | `createSession(payload)`                     |
| POST /training-sessions/:sessionId/records             | `src/services/sessionService.ts`       | `addRecord(sessionId, payload)`              |
| PATCH /training-sessions/:sessionId/records/:recordId  | `src/services/sessionService.ts`       | `updateRecord(sessionId, recordId, payload)` |
| DELETE /training-sessions/:sessionId/records/:recordId | `src/services/sessionService.ts`       | `deleteRecord(sessionId, recordId)`          |
| PATCH /training-sessions/:sessionId/complete           | `src/services/sessionService.ts`       | `completeSession(sessionId, payload)`        |
| GET /calendar/today                                    | `src/services/calendarService.ts`      | `getToday()`                                 |
| GET /calendar                                          | `src/services/calendarService.ts`      | `getMonthly(year, month)`                    |
| GET /calendar/week                                     | `src/services/calendarService.ts`      | `getWeekly()`                                |
| GET /progression/summary                               | `src/services/progressionService.ts`   | `getSummary()`                               |
| GET /progression/chart/:name                           | `src/services/progressionService.ts`   | `getChart(exerciseName)`                     |
